properties.name: sagaweaw.enabled
properties.description: Enables or disables Sagaweaw entirely. Set to false in specific test profiles if needed.

properties.name: sagaweaw.dashboard.mode
properties.description: Dashboard mode. 'standalone' serves on a dedicated port. 'embedded' serves under the application server on a configurable path.

properties.name: sagaweaw.dashboard.port
properties.description: Port for the dashboard in standalone mode. Default: 8484.

properties.name: sagaweaw.dashboard.path
properties.description: Context path for the dashboard in embedded mode.

properties.name: sagaweaw.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Default maximum retry attempts for steps that do not define their own RetryPolicy.

properties.name: sagaweaw.retry.polling-interval-ms
properties.description: How often (in milliseconds) the RetryScheduler polls for steps to retry.

properties.name: sagaweaw.outbox.polling-interval-ms
properties.description: How often (in milliseconds) the OutboxRelay polls for unpublished messages.

properties.name: sagaweaw.outbox.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of outbox messages published per polling cycle.
